• Interactive UI for configuring canvas size, frame polygon, image layers, and typography.
  • Supports automatic or manual focus‑image scaling, alignment, and side‑overlap toggling.
  • Loads Google Fonts via API, caches them, and allows custom font uploads.
    canvas.width = state.width;
    ctx.drawImage(imgs.fg, rx, ry, dw, dh);

This app lets users compose custom wallpapers with a polygonal frame, background blur, and stacked text layers. Images can be cropped, aligned, and set to appear in front of selected frame sides, while fonts are fetched dynamically from Google Fonts or uploaded locally. The final design can be exported as a PNG file.
